creator: nmh@t3x.org
text:
Having just learned from the 4.1 handbook that an inappropriate subject
line may imply that a PR is ignored, I'm sending this message. Please
have a look at

ports/22047, ports/22048. These are in fact new ports.

Unfortunately, the 3.3 handbook does not provide any hints regarding
good subject lines for PRs.

Bye,
	nmh.
